articles.title: Patriots 2026 position preview: Linebackers edition
articles.description:
The Patriots' linebackers were elite under Mike Vrabel last year. Will they stay healthy enough to do it again?

The post Patriots 2026 position preview: Linebackers edition appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Patriots linebackers excelled under coach Mike Vrabel last season, showcasing elite performance.
In 2026, health will be crucial for maintaining their top-tier status.
Boston residents hope for continued defensive strength to enhance team success this season.

articles.title: Man dead after apparent drowning in Randolph
articles.description:
First responders found the man in Great Pond after receiving a 911 call about a swimmer in distress.

The post Man dead after apparent drowning in Randolph appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: First responders discovered a man in Great Pond after a 911 call about a swimmer in distress.
The incident occurred in Randolph, impacting local safety and emergency response protocols.
Residents are reminded of water safety measures following this tragic drowning incident.
